issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across post-referral and pre-referral workflows. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these deal stages. A fix was applied to the workflow filters on March 9, 2026.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals from the post-referral workflow to stop further tasks.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset to Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage (e.g., Referred Active or Committed), and then updated back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. The criteria was updated to include it.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any affected deals into the TC Offer Accepted workflow to ensure tasks are generated.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with previous loan officer's name after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-side problem and was resolved by Luis. The affected deal showed Paul instead of Julie Yocum as the LO in outgoing agent emails.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails to agents that went out with the incorrect LO information during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted stage were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for closing coordination. HubSpot support was consulted and a fix was applied. The issue appeared to affect deals without an assigned loan officer, though the exact root cause was not confirmed publicly.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 into the TC workflow to generate the required tasks.
